scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/core build && pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/simulator-data build && pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/web dev
scripts.dev:auto: pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/core build && pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/simulator-data build && pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/web dev:auto
scripts.dev:clean:auto: pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/core build && pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/simulator-data build && pnpm --filter @swarm-cdp/web dev:clean:auto
